[2020-04-20 13:54] flakmaniak: Yeah, what Polari said about tempo. If absorbing on a Lancetooth lets me have a much better buy, that can easily outweigh being -1 abstract value compared to absorbing on a wall.
[2020-04-20 13:54] Deleted User (Deleted User): i think absorbing on tooth is decently better than splitter
[2020-04-20 13:56] iminabearsuit: That's accepted by pretty much everyone yes.
[2020-04-20 13:57] iminabearsuit: Same with holding Omega Splitter over blocking on wall.
[2020-04-20 13:59] p0lari (Polari): clicking omega and wall absorbing is +3 damage -3 absorb -6 tempo, that's quite a bit more significant than +1 damage -1 absorb -1 tempo in splitter vs lancetooth
[2020-04-20 14:00] p0lari (Polari): in a vacuum the tooth absorb is better, sure, but in practise it comes down to how those differences affect each player's granularity and purchases which isn't trivially better for tooth absorb by any means
[2020-04-20 14:00] Deleted User (Deleted User): it's more like the difference of arka>omega or omega>dm
[2020-04-20 14:00] iminabearsuit: You have to assume that you already have the wall, to make the comparison correct.
[2020-04-20 14:01] iminabearsuit: So it's only 3 tempo
[2020-04-20 14:01] iminabearsuit: Which is the same ratio.
[2020-04-20 14:03] p0lari (Polari): how does that make sense, if we have the same units in both scenarios then in the one where you absorb on omega you get to soak on the wall, which makes it +6 tempo
[2020-04-20 14:03] p0lari (Polari): if you make the assumption that we didn't buy the wall in one of the cases, then you need to account for the fact that we got to spend the resources on something else instead
[2020-04-20 14:03] p0lari (Polari): which is exactly the advantage the +tempo number represents

[2020-04-21 10:18] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): @Name It's been a while since I used it, by my ban list was Ampo, Apollo, Arms Race, Caut, Chrono, Corpus, Doomed Wall, Drake, Vore, EMatrix, Feral, Galvani, HH, Iceblade, Infusion, Mahar, Odin, Omega, Plexo, Polywall, Proto, Shredder, SF, Vivid, Zemora.  IIRC I left in a bunch of units like Antima, Arka, Fuge, Reso, Savior, Wincer because I misplayed them often enough that they didn't raise my win %.  I might add Smorcus, Brooder, Bull to the list but it all comes down to what you want to practice/what you enjoy.
[2020-04-21 10:21] velizar_ (Name): I think it plays fine with Vore
[2020-04-21 10:21] Deleted User (Deleted User): speaking of zrazhtplyr where has SSP gone
[2020-04-21 10:21] velizar_ (Name): and ok with EMatrix, and its Feral wasn't too bad though it wasn't very good either
[2020-04-21 10:21] velizar_ (Name): and it kicked my ass with Iceblade, maybe due to my own misplays
[2020-04-21 10:22] velizar_ (Name): and it doesn't buy Infusion so maybe you're right to buy that one - it's a good unit, it should buy Infusion
[2020-04-21 10:22] velizar_ (Name): and idk about it misplaying Vivid, either. At worst, it would run out of drones to hold and then get breached for vivids.
[2020-04-21 10:23] velizar_ (Name): it was alright with hellhound too
[2020-04-21 10:24] velizar_ (Name): also doesn't it misplay Grimbotch? It seems like it buys it too much
[2020-04-21 10:24] velizar_ (Name): (Although it sometimes kicks my ass with it, so...)
[2020-04-21 10:26] velizar_ (Name): and... it misplays Rhino too, but maybe banning that would break the game too much?
[2020-04-21 10:26] velizar_ (Name): also idk if I've ever seen it use Auric properly
[2020-04-21 10:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): jesus master bot does not know how to fight smorcus
[2020-04-21 10:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): its quite competent with small red units like botch and vore i found, going fastimus every time
[2020-04-21 10:28] velizar_ (Name): also it's bad with freeze. All of the freeze. It wastes it too much, and it also misses opportunities to exploit defenses. So maybe it's ok with Iceblade though not great, but it's terrible with limited-use freeze.
[2020-04-21 10:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): it also goes fastimus in dgrid set, which is kinda silly
[2020-04-21 10:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): but it cannot defend an elyot animus smorcus rush
[2020-04-21 10:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): or even a crazimus smorcus rush
[2020-04-21 10:29] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): It offers bad gambits vs Vore, it goes too small on econ with Ematrix, Feral aggression is too simple of a path to victory for me to resist.  For iceblade/bull it doesn't hit the attack threshold, but if you can't use those units better than the AI its good to practice.  It may have been old vivid that it was bad with or it may have been that it goes vivid+breachproof.  Its ok with HH, but i found that when I bought more HH I could out efficiency it without thinking.  I also misplay botch, so that might be a personal thing.  Auric is w/e, it doesn't have much impact.
[2020-04-21 10:30] velizar_ (Name): Not sure if I ever saw it use Resophore adequately.
[2020-04-21 10:31] velizar_ (Name): It's weird with Tia - it sometimes kicks my ass, but often misplays, tends to either buy Tia against too much defense, or neglect to defend itself against Tia. I think it only kicks my ass because I don't pay attention to the game.
[2020-04-21 10:32] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): Yeah, I've been punished by Tia enough to leave it in despite the misplays
[2020-04-21 10:32] velizar_ (Name): Oh, and Kinetic driver too - it snipes really early. It snipes my conduit for no reason most of the time.
[2020-04-21 10:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): well, the thing is the AI only uses Q defense
[2020-04-21 10:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): so you can offer a bad gambit and it wont accept
[2020-04-21 10:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): and it assumes you will do the same
[2020-04-21 10:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): which if course is not true
[2020-04-21 10:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): give it the option to sac rhino onto wall
[2020-04-21 10:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): or sac wall onto rhino and breach your dgrid
[2020-04-21 10:33] masn6811 (Masne98888): it will always keep its wall
[2020-04-21 10:34] velizar_ (Name): Noted that I shouldn't often accept gambits like that then
[2020-04-21 10:35] velizar_ (Name): Also I don't think it understands the concept of denying absorb, so maybe all units which cost attack + Thermite core should also be banned
[2020-04-21 10:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): it doesnt even deny granularity
[2020-04-21 10:35] velizar_ (Name): we're banning over half of all units, but that sounds about right for the bot.
[2020-04-21 10:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): say you have wall forcefield engi
[2020-04-21 10:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): they have 3 splitters + pixie
[2020-04-21 10:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): it won't hold splitter so that it can buy an ampo
[2020-04-21 10:36] masn6811 (Masne98888): it only holds splitter if it exploits you
